channel.title: Posts on Ops Under Pressure
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ops Under Pressure

item.title: SAP HANA High Availability on AWS with Pacemaker
item.description: A complete, sanitized, practical guide for building a SAP HANA High Availability cluster on AWS using Pacemaker, STONITH, overlay IPs, quorum devices, SAPHanaSR hooks, and preload readiness validation.

item.title: The RHEL 5 Hyper-V Migration That Booted Straight Into Rescue Mode
item.description: A real-world RHEL 5 to Hyper-V migration story covering rescue mode, LVM activation, GRUB cleanup, initrd rebuilds, and Hyper-V driver surprises.
